chore(deps): bump fizeau v0.14.0 → v0.14.1 [ddx-51e9076c]

MinPower/MaxPower bounds, and proactive endpoint aliveness probing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

)"
